productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Phoenix White Sports Shoes
description: Recommended by our office staff, this is an extremely comfortable Sports shoe from adidas which you can rely on to take care of your feet. The simple, slick design will easily coordinate with your sports or gym apparel - wear this to look and feel great!UpperSmooth synthetic upper with contrast 3-Stripe overlaysCentral lace-up system for a snug FitRaised heel tab at back heel which protects the Achilles tendon and locks the shoe in placeSoft, cushioned mesh collar and tongueMidsoleInjected EVA midsole for long-term, lightweight cushioningOutsoleAbrasion resistant grooves and lugs give excellent gripShoe careUse a moist cloth to remove dust and dirtDon't expose the shoe to direct sunlight or heatDon't use detergents or solvents
